meta.name: Hotel Comp on Fees
meta.p1a: Phase 1A - Flat fees. Compensation on flat-rate partner fees. Bundled with 1B for a single launch.
meta.p1b: Phase 1B - Fees as taxes. Compensation on fees loaded as taxes. Launched together with 1A as one narrative.
meta.p1c: Phase 1C - Mandatory fees. Compensation on mandatory partner fees. Kept separate from 1A/1B as a different narrative. Later timing.
meta.objective: Hotel Comp on Fees ensures EG is compensated across the range of hotel fees - flat fees, fees loaded as taxes, and mandatory fees - correcting gaps in what is currently collected. Delivered in phases: 1A and 1B are bundled corrections launching together; 1C follows as a separate narrative. Scope spans ~178,000 HMP and HEP properties. Target: $83.4M annualised RMD by 2027, measured as Net Program RMD - incremental comp minus lost RMD from attrition and BML degradation. Pilot 3 Aug, validation gate 5 Sep, full rollout 14 Sep 2026.
meta.ragReason: Provider-chain dev dependency and HEP approval gate outstanding.

risks.risk: HEP chain charge-ability - 21 chains flagged in 30 Jun HEP/Legal review
risks.mitigation: Cannot charge without agreement update: 6 chains (IHG, Minor, Mandarin Oriental, NH, Diamond, Omni), ~$0.6M combined (1A $0.05M / 1B $0.55M), ~2,884 props (volume mostly IHG, low value). Conditional yes: 15 chains, ~$9.45M combined (1A $3.0M / 1B $6.45M), 93% in Marriott/Hyatt/Four Seasons ($8.83M). Condition content pending from Legal. 1C not yet sized.

decisions.title: Unified comms narrative + default-include partners
decisions.detail: Comms cover the full program (1A/1B/1C) as one narrative, not phase-by-phase. Default-include all partners unless a contractual prohibition exists (HEP and Vegas reviewed on that basis).

decisions.title: 1A + 1B bundled as a single launch
decisions.detail: Both are hygiene corrections - one release, one comms narrative, one readiness cycle. EPF launches immediately without proactive comms. 1A/1B narrative kept separate from 1C (tax compliance vs contract rights).

decisions.title: Success metric = Net Program RMD
decisions.detail: Approved measure: Net Program RMD = Incremental Comp on Fees minus Lost RMD from attrition and BML degradation. Target $83.4M annualised by 2027.

decisions.title: Launch dates locked
decisions.detail: 3 Aug pilot, 5 Sep validation gate, 14 Sep full rollout (1A+1B bundled), subject to pilot go/no-go.

decisions.title: Tiered provider rollout + 15 Jul scope gate
decisions.detail: 429 providers across 3 tiers (21 white-glove, 37 proactive, 371 long-tail). Top 21 outreach by 15 Jul scope gate (~$11M of $22M 1A RMD). If gate missed, 14 Sep at risk.

decisions.title: 1A/1B legal scope confirmed as hygiene
decisions.detail: 1A/1B contract review is hygiene, not a blocker. 1C is separate. Identified chains unable to proceed (cannot-charge, negligible: $0.05M/1A, $0.55M/1B), plus a number of chains with conditional qualifiers still to be worked through.

decisions.title: PR/crisis pack required before pilot launch
decisions.detail: Holding statements and FAQ pre-built before any partner comms go out. Kyle consult-only at this stage. FAQ due Wed 2 Jul.

steerco.title: SteerCo #1 - Program kickoff
steerco.materials: Program context and phase status; rollout options (1A/1B/1C); comms strategy; HEP inclusion approach. Chair: Fateha K, Sponsor: Steve Q
steerco.decisions: Confirmed: comms cover full program (1A/1B/1C) as one unified narrative, not phase-by-phase. Confirmed: default include all partners unless contractual prohibition (HEP and Vegas reviewed on that basis). Confirmed: follow-up SteerCo in 2-3 wks. Deferred: 1A go-live date (mid-June seen as ambitious); 1C option (lean Option B - non-connected Sep, connected Nov); success metric endorsement (must also capture negative impacts)
steerco.actions: Fateha K: schedule follow-up, share draft partner comms, present 1B/1C options with risk-reward scenarios, success metrics incl. negative impacts. Tia P: Booking.com fee exception analysis (Vegas + others). Kamal K: share payment change info with Rachel B. Rachel B / Julie: HEP inclusion + Vegas strategy

steerco.title: SteerCo #2
steerco.materials: Scope expansion 79 to 178,000 properties (ETP properties found); 1A+1B bundling debate; technical readiness (mid-July code, 2-3 wks UAT); Aug vs Sep launch (~$1.8M RMD / $1.6M GP per month delay); success metrics framework; 1C separate session
steerco.decisions: Confirmed: 1A and 1B bundled as single launch (both hygiene corrections, one comms narrative). Confirmed: proactive comms for bundle + connectivity provider comms in parallel. Confirmed: success metric = Net Program RMD (Incremental Comp on Fees minus Lost RMD from attrition and BML degradation). Confirmed: EPF launches immediately, no proactive comms. Confirmed: 1A/1B narrative kept separate from 1C. Deferred: go/no-go on Aug vs Sep (async email once readiness confirmed); 1C timing (smaller group - Mohit C/Steve Q/Golan/Julie/Joey)
steerco.actions: Fateha K: update deck with 1C figures, align success metrics (RMD vs supplier margin per Steve Q), send notes/recording. Kamal K: quantify Aug downside risk (Avail/BML/visibility booster) vs $1.8M upside. Tia P: launch EPF; confirm code/UAT dates; confirm 1B connectivity lead time and 60-day notice. Fateha K/Mohit C: validate data integrity for +65k properties. Mohit C: rollout plan options Aug vs Sep. Mohit C/Steve Q/Golan: final go/no-go async

steerco.title: SteerCo #3 - Async (email update)
steerco.materials: Commercial model email: Aug vs Sep launch - Aug $18.5M RMD / $16.7M GP, Sep $14.9M RMD / $13.4M GP; slip cost $3.6M RMD; peak-summer downside base $9.7M RMD; net base -$6.1M
steerco.decisions: 14 Sep full rollout (1A+1B) on pilot go/no-go; 5 Sep validation gate; 3 Aug pilot
steerco.actions: Provider tiering (21 white-glove / 37 proactive / 371 long-tail); 15 Jul scope gate
